# Assessment Report

```yaml
assessment_report_id: cafe-assessment-001
reviewed_artifacts: [00_conversation/lesson_scope_lock.md, 02_progression_plan.md, 03_lesson_blueprint.md, 00_conversation/post_lesson_teacher_card.md, 00_conversation/next_lesson_decision_lock.md, 10_next_lesson_check.md]
overall_status: pass
findings: []
contract_checks: {passed: [build lock valid, progression matches lock, full followup has next lock, teacher overrides preserved], failed: []}
learning_checks: {passed: [situation-led, grammar-and-vocabulary tracked, teacher-approved progression], failed: []}
approval_checks: {lesson_scope_lock_valid: true, teacher_overrides_preserved: true, followup_scope_valid: true, next_lesson_decision_lock_valid: true}
privacy_checks: {passed: [synthetic data only], failed: []}
```

The approved homework card made homework-only outputs eligible before the next lesson lock. The next lesson check was withheld until the next lock became valid.
